# Backend Feature Pre-Merge Checklist

## Workflow Coverage
- [ ] target_define
- [ ] research
- [ ] plan
- [ ] execute
- [ ] verify
- [ ] distill_to_skill
- [ ] memory_update
- [ ] winner_dna_update

## Governance
- [ ] No bypass of verify or promotion gate
- [ ] Law trace remains complete and enforced

## Runtime Boundaries
- [ ] Routed through orchestrator/runtime flow
- [ ] No standalone shortcut path added

## Verification
- [ ] scripts/verify_backend.sh executed
- [ ] Failures (if any) documented with fixes

## Contracts
- [ ] Backend schema changes evaluated for frontend impact
- [ ] frontend/src/lib/api.ts updated when required

## Docs and Tests
- [ ] Related docs updated or linked
- [ ] New/updated tests cover feature behavior

## Sign-off
- [ ] Ready for review
- [ ] Ready to merge
